name: accountants at small firms processing 5–15 tax documents/month tool
description: For accountants at small firms processing 5–15 tax documents/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide automated issue flagging instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
target_audience: accountants at small firms processing 5–15 tax documents/month
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track tax documentation and identify issues in a timely manner.
